mxCell.value: PROJECT RenewAI — FULL SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE v2.0 (Enhanced: Critique Agent + Loyalty Engine)
Multi-Agent Agentic AI | Azure India Cloud | 4.8M Policyholders | 9 Languages
LAYER 1 — DATA & INTEGRATION

CRM System
Policy data, payment history
customer segments, preferences
renewal due dates, contact info
+ Claim history & loyalty tier

Payment Gateway
UPI, ECS Mandate
AutoPay, EMI Setup
Live payment status

Policy Document Store
Benefits, T&C, premium tables
Fund NAV (ULIPs)
Used by RAG retrieval

Semantic Memory Store
Customer intent history
Conversation context (cross-session)
Channel engagement signals

Objection Library (RAG)
150 objection-response pairs
Dynamic, refreshed monthly
Multi-language indexed

Propensity-to-Lapse Model
Customer segment scoring
'Wealth Builder' / 'Budget Conscious'
Risk tier: Low / Medium / High

🎁 Loyalty & Offers Engine
NEW
• Claim history (last FY)
• No-Claim Discount rules
• Repeat customer loyalty tiers
• Priority service eligibility
• Cross-sell/upsell offers

IRDAI Regulatory Rules
Tech Framework 2024
RBI FREE-AI Framework 2025
DPDPA 2023 compliance

☁ Azure India Cloud
ISO 27001 | SOC 2 Type II
RBI data residency compliant
Auto-scaling | Zero-downtime
LAYER 2 — AI PLATFORM SERVICES

🤖 Large Language Model
Cloud API
• Message generation
• Intent classification
• Objection handling
• Language selection (9 langs)

📚 RAG Retrieval Engine
• Policy doc retrieval
• Benefit summaries (grounded)
• Objection library search
• Fund NAV lookup (ULIP)
Never generative on financials

🛡 Content Safety Layer
• Distress keyword detection
  (Hindi + EN + 6 regional)
• PII masking before inference
• Hallucination detection → suspend
• Regulatory violation prevention

🗣 AI Voice Engine
• 9 Indian languages
• Real-time transcription
• Intent extraction
• Script adaptation
• Cloud telephony

📄 Document Intelligence
• Parse scanned policy forms
• Payment receipt OCR
  (WhatsApp shared)
• Data extraction & validation

⚙ AI Workflow Engine
• State machine per policyholder
• HITL interrupt nodes
• Branching logic rules
• Auto-retry & escalation timers

🎁 Loyalty & Offers AI Engine
NEW
• No-Claim Discount calculator
• Repeat customer tier logic
• Cross-sell recommendation
• Dynamic offer personalization
• IRDAI-compliant offer framing

🔬 A/B Testing Engine
• Message variant testing
• Offer effectiveness tracking
• Continuous optimization
• Weekly quality eval (5%)
LAYER 3 — AGENTIC AI LAYER (5 Agents + Human Queue)

🧠 ORCHESTRATOR AGENT
Master Planner — activates at T-45 days for every due policy

• Reads: CRM data, payment history, channel prefs, segment scores, loyalty tier + claim history
• Decides: Channel sequence → Timing → Language → Tone → Applicable Offers
• Manages: State machine per policyholder with branching logic
• Detects: High-complexity flags → routes to Human Queue

📧 EMAIL AGENT
• Personalized renewal emails
• Tone adapts per segment
• Open/click tracking → Orchestrator
• RAG for benefit summaries
• Embeds loyalty offers & discounts
ESCALATES: No open after 3 tries;
payment link error; complaint reply

💬 WHATSAPP AGENT
• Conversational flows + QR payment
• Intent detection & memory (cross-session)
• Processes 'pay later', collects reasons
• Doc parsing for shared receipts
• Presents no-claim & loyalty offers
ESCALATES: Negative sentiment;
hardship/illness/dispute mentioned

📞 VOICE AGENT
• Outbound AI calls (9 languages)
• Reads live payment status first
• Dynamic objection handling (150 pairs)
• Offers EMI, grace period, AutoPay
• Mentions applicable discounts/offers
ESCALATES: Human requested;
distress keywords; 3 objections fail

👤 HUMAN QUEUE MANAGER
• Routes escalated ≤10% cases
• Full context briefing note:
  policy summary + AI interactions
  + detected sentiment + approach
  + loyalty tier & offer eligibility
• Auto priority scoring
• Full audit trail logging
Terminal human handoff node
LAYER 3.5 — ⭐ CRITIQUE AGENT (Quality Gate — Every AI Message Reviewed Before Delivery) — NEW

🔍 CRITIQUE AGENT — THE QUALITY GATE
Every AI-generated message passes through here BEFORE reaching customer
9-Point Validation Checklist:
1️⃣ Factual Accuracy — figures match RAG source docs
2️⃣ Tone-Segment Alignment — Wealth Builder ≠ Budget Conscious
3️⃣ Emotional Context — no cheerful tone if customer expressed difficulty
4️⃣ Logical Coherence — no contradiction with prior messages
5️⃣ Regulatory Compliance — no return guarantees, no false promises
6️⃣ Language Quality — grammar + cultural fit (9 languages)
7️⃣ Personalization Accuracy — correct name, policy #, product, premium
8️⃣ Conversation Completeness — response answers customer's actual question
9️⃣ Offer Validity — loyalty discount/offer correctly applied & IRDAI compliant

✅ PASS
Message delivered
to customer
(~200-500ms added)

🔄 REGENERATE
Feedback → source agent
Max 2 loops → then block
Soft fails: tone, logic, language

🔴 BLOCK
Message NOT sent
→ Human Queue
Hard fails: regulatory, factual,
wrong customer, invalid offer

🔄 Loop back to
source agent with
specific feedback
LAYER 4 — CUSTOMER CHANNEL LAYER (Outbound — Messages Passed Critique)

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
4.8M Policyholders
14.4L renewals/year
9 languages | 24/7

📧 Email Channel
Personalized emails
Open/click tracked
'Renew Now' CTA
+ Loyalty offer banner

💬 WhatsApp Channel
Business API flows
Payment QR codes
Conversational AI
+ Discount message card

📞 Voice Channel
Outbound AI calls
9 Indian languages
Preferred time slots
+ Verbal loyalty offer

💳 Payment Completion
UPI / ECS / AutoPay
EMI / Partial Payment
→ CRM updated instantly
Discount auto-applied

🔄 Post-Lapse Revival
90-day multi-touch campaign
Personalized revival quotation
Penalty waiver calculation
LAYER 5 — HUMAN SPECIALIST LAYER (20 People)

👤×8 Sr. Renewal RRMs
HNI, complex, bereavement
₹1L+ premium policies
+ Authorize custom offers

👤×5 Revival Specialists
Lapsed, re-underwriting
penalty waivers

👤×2 Compliance
IRDAI, ombudsman
grievance handling

👤×3 AI Ops & Quality
Monitor, tune, retrain
guardrails, audit logs
+ Manage offer rules
👤×1 Renewal Head + 👤×1 AI Trainer (ext.)
🎁 LOYALTY & RETENTION OFFERS ENGINE — NEW FEATURE

🏆 No-Claim Discount
If policyholder has NOT made
any claim in last FY →
5-15% premium discount
on next year renewal
(tier-based: 1yr=5%, 3yr=10%, 5yr+=15%)

⭐ Repeat Customer Priority
Consecutive renewal (3+ yrs) →
Priority service tier:
• Dedicated RRM access
• Faster claim settlement (SLA)
• Early renewal reminder (T-60)
• Birthday/anniversary greetings

🎯 Dynamic Offers
AI selects best incentive per case:
• Free rider add-on (accidental)
• Premium holiday (1 month free)
• Cross-sell bundle discount
• AutoPay cashback ₹200
All offers IRDAI-compliant
LAYER 6 — MONITORING, AUDIT & GOVERNANCE

📊 AI Observability Platform
Full trace: every agent action,
decision, and escalation logged
IRDAI audit-ready format
+ Critique Agent pass/fail logs

✅ Quality Evaluation
Weekly auto-eval on 5% random sample
AI Response Accuracy: ≥87% → ≥95%
Monthly objection library refresh
+ Critique rejection rate tracking

🏛 IRDAI Compliance Engine
Tech Framework 2024 aligned
DPDPA 2023 compliant
Grievance register → 0 violations target
+ Offer/discount compliance audit
Monthly Renewal Head review

🔒 Security Layer
PII masking before AI inference
All convos encrypted transit + rest
Data residency: India only
Annual third-party security audit

🖥 Admin Dashboard
Specialist workbench
Briefing notes, case queue
Override controls, audit trail
KPI balanced scorecard
+ Offer redemption dashboard

😊 NPS & Feedback Loop
Post-interaction survey (IVR/WA)
Target NPS: ≥55 (from 34)
Feeds back to A/B testing
+ Offer satisfaction tracking

🔍 Critique Agent Analytics
NEW
Pass rate, regen rate, block rate
Top failure categories
Latency impact tracking
Agent-wise quality scores
Data Source / Store
Knowledge / Memory
AI Agent
⭐ Critique Agent (NEW)
Human Specialist
Safety / Compliance
Monitoring / Governance
🎁 Loyalty & Offers (NEW)
Bidirectional data flow
Escalation path
Critique gate flow

90% autonomous AI handling → Only ≤10% escalated to humans | All financial data via RAG retrieval (never generative) | Critique Agent reviews EVERY message before delivery | Loyalty offers personalized per policyholder history

ARCHITECTURE CHANGES v2.0:
1. ⭐ CRITIQUE AGENT (Layer 3.5) — 9-point quality gate on every AI message. Pass/Regenerate/Block. Accuracy: 87% → 95%+. Cost: ~₹35-55L/yr additional LLM.
2. 🎁 LOYALTY & OFFERS ENGINE — No-Claim Discount (5-15%), Repeat Customer Priority Service, Dynamic Offers (riders, cashback, premium holiday). Projected +3-5% persistency uplift.
RenewAI v2.0 — INTELLIGENT RENEWAL JOURNEY: Decision Tree (T-45 → Post-Lapse) + Critique Gate + Loyalty Offers

POLICY RENEWAL
DUE IN 45 DAYS
Orchestrator activates
Reads: CRM + Segments + Prefs
+ Claim history & loyalty tier

🎁 LOYALTY & OFFER DECISION
Orchestrator determines:
• No-claim in last FY? → 5-15% discount
• Consecutive renewal 3+ yrs? → Priority tier
• High lapse risk? → Extra incentive
  (free rider / cashback / holiday)
• Offer tagged to customer profile

T-45 📧 EMAIL

Personalized renewal email
Benefit reminder + premium amount
Payment options + 'Renew Now' CTA
Tone adapted per segment
RAG retrieval for benefit data
🎁 Loyalty offer embedded:
'Your no-claim discount: ₹X off!'

🔍 CRITIQUE
GATE

Email opened
within 48h?

✅ YES
Wait for
payment action

💳 PAID
Journey Ends ✓
Discount applied

T-30 💬 WHATSAPP

Conversational message in preferred language
Payment link + QR code
Intent detection & memory
EMI / 'pay later' options
🎁 'You qualify for X% discount!
Pay now and save ₹Y'

🔍 CRITIQUE
GATE

✅ YES — Conversation
WA Agent handles queries
Payment QR sent

⚠ NEGATIVE
Hardship / illness / dispute

✅ POSITIVE → PAID
Discount applied ✓

T-20 📞 AI VOICE CALL

Outbound call at preferred time
Reads live payment status first
Handles top 12 objections (RAG)
Offers EMI, grace period, AutoPay
🎁 'As a valued customer, you get
X% discount — shall I apply it?'

🔍 CRITIQUE
GATE

💳 PAID
Journey Ends ✓

≥3 UNRESOLVED
→ Human Queue

T-10 ⚡ 'LAST CHANCE'
WhatsApp + Email (dual)

ECS mandate setup link
UPI AutoPay option
Grace period explanation
🎁 Urgency + offer: 'Discount expires
with your renewal date!'

🚨 IMMEDIATE
HUMAN QUEUE
Distress detected
Escalation <2 hours
+ Custom hardship offer options

T-5 🔴 CRITICAL ZONE
AI Voice + WhatsApp (dual)

Urgent dual-channel outreach
30-day grace period offer
Premium holiday option
Partial payment plan
🎁 Maximum incentive deployed

💳 PAID
Saved in critical zone!

→ Human RRM
Briefing prepared auto
+ All offer history included
❌ POLICY LAPSED

🔄 REVIVAL CAMPAIGN (90 Days)

Multi-touch revival over 90 days
Personalized revival quotation
Penalty waiver calculation
🎁 Revival incentive: waived penalty
+ loyalty discount reinstated if paid
within 30 days of lapse
→ Human Specialist for re-underwriting

👤 HUMAN QUEUE MANAGER

Receives ≤10% of all cases

Full context briefing:
• Policy summary & all AI interactions
• Detected sentiment & recommended approach
• Loyalty tier, claim history, offers made
• Critique Agent rejection reasons (if any)

Auto priority scoring | Full audit trail

Routes to:
👤×8 Sr. RRMs (HNI, bereavement) — can approve custom offers
👤×5 Revival Specialists (lapsed, re-UW) — penalty waiver authority
👤×2 Compliance (IRDAI, ombudsman)
👤×3 AI Ops (monitor, tune) — manage offer rules
👤×1 Renewal Head | 👤×1 AI Trainer
NO →

🔍 CRITIQUE AGENT — ACTIVE AT EVERY CHANNEL STEP

9-Point Validation Checklist:
1️⃣ Factual Accuracy (RAG match) | 2️⃣ Tone-Segment alignment | 3️⃣ Emotional context
4️⃣ Logical coherence | 5️⃣ Regulatory compliance | 6️⃣ Language quality (9 langs)
7️⃣ Personalization accuracy | 8️⃣ Conversation completeness | 9️⃣ Offer validity & IRDAI compliance

✅ PASS → deliver | 🔄 REGENERATE → feedback to agent (max 2x) | 🔴 BLOCK → Human Queue
Projected accuracy improvement: 87% → 95%+ | Added latency: ~200-500ms

🛡 CONTENT SAFETY LAYER (active at every step)

• Distress keyword detection (Hindi + EN + 6 regional) → immediate human escalation <2h
• PII masking before every LLM inference call | All financial data from RAG — never generative
• Hallucination detected → case suspended → human review
• AI identifies itself as 'Suraksha's AI-powered renewal assistant' at every touchpoint
• Opt-out mechanism: customer can request human-only contact anytime

🎁 LOYALTY & RETENTION OFFERS — ACTIVE THROUGHOUT JOURNEY

No-Claim Discount: No claim filed in last FY → 5% off (1yr), 10% off (3yr), 15% off (5yr+)
Repeat Customer Priority: 3+ consecutive renewals → dedicated RRM access, faster claim SLA, T-60 reminders
Dynamic Incentives: Free accidental rider | Premium holiday (1 month) | AutoPay cashback ₹200
Revival Bonus: Penalty waiver + discount reinstated if paid within 30 days of lapse

All offers IRDAI-compliant | Validated by Critique Agent (checkpoint 9) | Tracked in CRM
RenewAI v2.0 — IMPLEMENTATION PHASES, RISK MAPPING & KPI TARGETS (+ Critique Agent + Loyalty Engine)
18-WEEK IMPLEMENTATION ROADMAP (Extended from 16 for Critique + Loyalty)

PHASE 0 — FOUNDATION
Weeks 1–3
☐ CRM data audit & cleansing
☐ Propensity-to-lapse model build
☐ Comm preference survey
☐ IRDAI compliance scoping
☐ AI vendor evaluation & selection
☐ Project team onboarding
☐ Claim history data extraction
☐ Loyalty tier definition & rules
☐ No-claim discount IRDAI approval

🏁 Data ready; loyalty rules approved;
stack confirmed

PHASE 1 — CORE BUILD
Weeks 4–8
☐ Orchestration engine dev
☐ Email Agent + delivery platform
☐ WhatsApp Agent + Business API
☐ CRM bidirectional sync
☐ Customer memory store
☐ Content safety layer config
☐ Admin dashboard build
☐ Loyalty & Offers Engine build
☐ No-claim discount calculator
☐ Critique Agent architecture

🏁 AI processes test cohort
with loyalty offers active

PHASE 2 — VOICE, RAG & CRITIQUE
Weeks 9–12
☐ AI voice integration (8 langs)
☐ Objection library ingestion (150 pairs)
☐ Document parsing (receipts)
☐ Observability platform live
☐ HITL interface testing
☐ Critique Agent build + testing
☐ 9-point checklist calibration
☐ Offer validation (checkpoint 9)
☐ Loyalty offer templates (9 langs)

🏁 Full system + critique +
loyalty functional in staging

PHASE 3 — PILOT
Weeks 13–15
☐ 20,000 policies pilot (5% of Q3)
☐ Shadow mode: AI + human review
☐ Measure all KPIs (see below)
☐ HITL escalation review
☐ IRDAI pilot notification filed
☐ Critique rejection rate tuning
☐ Offer redemption rate tracking
☐ A/B test: with vs without offers

🏁 Renewal ≥85%; zero violations;
offer uplift validated; IRDAI cleared

PHASE 4 — TRANSITION
Weeks 16–18
☐ Wk16: 40 agents exit
☐ Wk17: 40 agents exit
☐ Wk18: 20 agents exit
☐ 20 specialists trained
☐ Full production rollout
☐ 30-day hypercare support
☐ Loyalty dashboard live
☐ Critique Agent in production

🏁 Full production; 20-person
team operational; all features live

🚀 GO-LIVE — Q4 FY26
4.8M policyholders | 20 specialists | 24/7 AI
Critique Agent + Loyalty Engine active
RISK REGISTER — ENHANCED WITH CRITIQUE & LOYALTY RISKS

⚠ AI misclassifies grievance
Likelihood: Medium → Low (with Critique)
Mitigation: Distress keyword dict + Critique checkpoint 3 (emotional context)
Residual: Very Low — three-layer safety net

⚠ AI generates inaccurate policy info
Likelihood: Medium → Low (with Critique)
Mitigation: RAG-only financials + Critique checkpoint 1 (factual accuracy)
Residual: Very Low — grounded + validated

⚠ Customer trust erosion (AI-only)
Likelihood: Medium → Low (with Loyalty Offers)
Mitigation: Transparency + opt-out + loyalty rewards create positive association
Residual: Low — proactive value delivery

⚠ PII / Data privacy violation
Likelihood: Low
Mitigation: India hosting; PII masking; encryption; DPDPA 2023; annual audit + Critique checkpoint 7
Residual: Very Low

⚠ IRDAI requires HITL for renewal decisions
Likelihood: High (regulatory certainty)
Mitigation: AI facilitates, customer decides; HITL built in + Critique ensures compliance
Residual: Very Low — by design

⚠ NEW: Critique Agent over-blocks (false positives)
Likelihood: Medium (during calibration)
Mitigation: Calibration during pilot; weekly regen/block rate review; AI Ops tuning
Residual: Low — continuous optimization

⚠ NEW: Discount abuse / over-discounting
Likelihood: Low
Mitigation: Rule-based caps (max 15%); IRDAI-approved discount schedules; monthly P&L impact review by Renewal Head; Critique validates offers
Residual: Very Low — controlled + audited

⚠ Model drift reduces conversion
Likelihood: Low–Medium
Mitigation: Weekly 5% quality eval; monthly refresh; quarterly model review; A/B testing + Critique catch rate as drift signal
Residual: Low — continuous evaluation loop

🎁 LOYALTY & RETENTION OFFER STRUCTURE — DETAILED RULES

NO-CLAIM DISCOUNT
Rule: If policyholder has NOT made any claim against
their policy in the last completed financial year:

• 1 claim-free year → 5% premium discount
• 3 consecutive claim-free years → 10% discount
• 5+ consecutive claim-free years → 15% discount

Max cap: 15% | Applicable to: Term, Endowment, Health Rider
Reset: Resets to 0% upon any claim year
Validation: Auto-calculated from CRM claim history
Critique checkpoint 9: Verifies correct tier applied

REPEAT CUSTOMER PRIORITY
Rule: Consecutive on-time renewals without lapse:

• 3+ years → Silver Tier
  → T-60 early reminder (15 days extra)
  → Birthday / anniversary greeting

• 5+ years → Gold Tier
  → Dedicated RRM access
  → Faster claim settlement SLA (10 → 5 days)

• 10+ years → Platinum Tier
  → All Gold benefits + Renewal Head access
  → Complimentary health check-up voucher
  → Priority callback (within 30 min)

Reset: Drops 1 tier upon lapse; reinstated after revival

DYNAMIC INCENTIVES
AI selects best incentive per case:

• High lapse risk + Budget Conscious
  → Free accidental death rider (1yr)

• Medium risk + WhatsApp responsive
  → AutoPay setup cashback ₹200

• Wealth Builder + ULIP
  → Fund switch fee waiver

• Post-lapse revival (within 30 days)
  → Penalty waiver + discount reinstated

• Critical zone (T-5)
  → Premium holiday (1 month free)

All offers: IRDAI compliant | Critique validated
